title: iverilog gives no warning against dangling wires within a module

features.name: dangling wire used in combinational logic
features.description: Code should include a wire declaration that is never assigned a value but is used in a combinational assign statement within a module
features.snippet:
wire e;
assign d = c & e;

features.name: unconnected input port during instantiation
features.description: Code should include a module instantiation where an input port is not connected (dangling port connection)
